overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from an underwater survival game (Subnautica), swimming through an alien ocean kelp forest and exploring a dark cave system with bioluminescent flora. The player moves from bright open water into a shadowy cavern and back out again.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow kelp forest with rocky outcrops

events.description: character's gloved hands come into view, indicating active swimming
approaching the edge of a steep underwater cliff formation

agents.ego_description: swimming steadily through the kelp forest, examining the rocky seabed and approaching stone formations

entered.detail: Towering alien kelp stalks reaching toward the water surface, covered in small leaves
Light-colored sandy bottom with scattered rocks and patches of green algae
Large natural stone archway covered in marine growth
Steep drop-off leading into deeper, darker water

segments.scene_description: The player swims through bright teal open water in an alien kelp forest. Tall kelp stalks rise on the right while the sandy seabed passes below. A large rock arch formation becomes visible on the left as the player approaches the edge of an underwater cliff.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition zone approaching underwater cave entrance

events.description: water becomes noticeably darker and greener as the cave entrance approaches
entering the dark cave tunnel, sky visibility begins to disappear

agents.ego_description: swimming toward and into the dark cave entrance, navigating between kelp stalks and rock outcrops

notable_agents.action: school of small silver fish swimming in a coordinated group through the water column

entered.detail: Shadowy opening in the rock wall leading into the enclosed cavern system
Swarming silver fish reflecting light as they swim together

segments.scene_description: The player approaches the cave entrance as the water darkens significantly. A school of small fish swims across the view as the player enters the shadowy cave mouth, leaving the open kelp forest behind. The rock walls begin to enclose the space on both sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark underwater cavern with bioluminescent flora

events.description: bioluminescent orange lights become visible on the cave walls, illuminating the darkness
swimming under a low stone archway, navigating through the narrow cave passage
passing clusters of glowing underwater plants attached to the rock surfaces

agents.ego_description: carefully navigating through the dark cave system, swimming under rock arches and past bioluminescent growths while avoiding collisions with walls

entered.detail: Glowing orange-yellow flora emitting soft light in the darkness, attached to cave walls
Dark jagged rock surfaces forming the overhead cave ceiling
Natural rock archway forming a tunnel passage through the cave system

segments.scene_description: Deep inside the lightless cave, the player navigates through narrow passages illuminated only by bioluminescent flora. The environment is enclosed by rock walls and ceilings. The player swims through natural stone arches, passing glowing orange plant clusters attached to the surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: open kelp forest with tall stone spires

events.description: exiting the dark cave system back into bright open water
returning to bright teal water with sunlight filtering through from the surface

agents.ego_description: swimming out of the cave system and back into the open kelp forest, ascending slightly toward the surface light

entered.detail: Monolithic rock spire rising vertically from the seabed in the distance
Sunlit exit from the cave leading back to the open ocean environment

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the dark cave back into the bright open water. The water returns to a clear teal color with sunlight filtering down. Tall kelp stalks become visible again, and a tall stone spire rises in the distance ahead as the player continues swimming forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous underwater journey that transitions from a sunlit alien kelp forest into a dark, bioluminescent cavern before returning to the open ocean. It begins in bright teal waters, gliding past towering kelp stalks and a large rock arch as the camera approaches the edge of an underwater cliff. As the player enters a shadowy cave mouth, the light fades significantly and a school of small fish darts across the view, leaving the open forest behind for enclosing rock walls. The scene then shifts into a lightless interior where the camera navigates narrow passages and stone arches illuminated only by glowing orange plant clusters. Finally, the player emerges from the darkness back into the clear teal water, where sunlight filters down once more and a tall stone spire rises in the distance.
